blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
